vault_pc.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3090 with 24GB GDDR6X VRAM
vault_pc.storage: 1TB NVMe Gen4 SSD for OS and models, optional 2TB NVMe later

scout_edge.accelerator: Raspberry Pi AI HAT+ 2, 40 TOPS class Hailo accelerator with 8GB GenAI board layer
scout_edge.audio: planned I2S audio HAT or USB audio interface
scout_edge.base: RasProver robotics base with motor controller, possible wheel encoders, and IMU
role: sending events to the vault PC
scout_edge.vision: CSI camera, with optional dual-camera depth later
